scripts.prepare: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && cd backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.cypress: wait-on tcp:4000 && wait-on tcp:3000 && cd frontend && npm run cypress
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test:e2e: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run cypress" --kill-others --success first
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
